{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Plan a new hire – Grant Tracker{% endblock %} {% block content %} ← Scenarios

Plan a new hire

A read-only capacity check: given a time window and a set of new hires (by department and role), do your current grants have enough uncommitted balance to cover them, and if so, how might their effort be split? This doesn't create any students, allocations, or scenarios -- it's just a planning report. Each hire is assumed to need 100% effort for the whole window.

{% if departments %}
{% else %}

Add at least one department first, on the Departments page.

{% endif %}
{% if plans %}

Grants considered

Spare capacity only accounts for commitments within the selected window -- a grant heavily committed just after the window can still show its full uncommitted balance as spare here.

{% if excluded_grants %}

Excluded from this window: {% for grant, reason in excluded_grants %}{{ grant.name }} ({{ reason }}){{ ", " if not loop.last }}{% endfor %}.

{% endif %}

Hires fully placed{{ plan.fully_placed_count }} / {{ plan.requested_count }}
Total cost (window)${{ plan.total_cost_cents | money }}
